rsi_overbought.description: Check if RSI is above the overbought threshold. RSI values above 70 typically indicate overbought conditions, suggesting the asset may be due for a pullback. In crypto markets, consider higher thresholds (80/20) during strong trends.

rsi_oversold.description: Check if RSI is below the oversold threshold. RSI values below 30 typically indicate oversold conditions, suggesting the asset may be due for a bounce. In crypto markets, consider higher thresholds (80/20) during strong trends.

rsi_cross_up.description: Check if RSI crosses above a threshold level. Returns True when RSI was at or below the threshold in the previous bar and is now above the threshold in the current bar. In crypto markets, consider higher thresholds (80/20) during strong trends.

rsi_cross_down.description: Check if RSI crosses below a threshold level. Returns True when RSI was at or above the threshold in the previous bar and is now below the threshold in the current bar. In crypto markets, consider higher thresholds (80/20) during strong trends.

stoch_overbought.description: Check if Stochastic %K is above the overbought threshold.

stoch_oversold.description: Check if Stochastic %K is below the oversold threshold.

williams_r_overbought.description: Check if Williams %R is above the overbought threshold. Williams %R ranges from -100 to 0. Values above -20 indicate overbought.

williams_r_oversold.description: Check if Williams %R is below the oversold threshold. Williams %R ranges from -100 to 0. Values below -80 indicate oversold.

tsi_bullish.description: Check if True Strength Index indicates bullish momentum. TSI above zero indicates bullish momentum.

tsi_bearish.description: Check if True Strength Index indicates bearish momentum. TSI below zero indicates bearish momentum.

uo_overbought.description: Check if Ultimate Oscillator indicates overbought condition.

uo_oversold.description: Check if Ultimate Oscillator indicates oversold condition.

kama_cross_up.description: Check if price crosses above KAMA (bullish signal).

kama_cross_down.description: Check if price crosses below KAMA (bearish signal).

roc_positive.description: Check if Rate of Change indicates positive momentum.

roc_negative.description: Check if Rate of Change indicates negative momentum.

roc_momentum_shift.description: Check if ROC crosses zero (momentum shift).

direction.description: Direction: 'bullish' for cross above zero, 'bearish' for cross below

ao_bullish.description: Check if Awesome Oscillator indicates bullish momentum.

ao_bearish.description: Check if Awesome Oscillator indicates bearish momentum.

ao_zero_cross.description: Check if Awesome Oscillator crosses zero line.

direction.description: Direction: 'bullish' for cross above, 'bearish' for cross below

stochrsi_overbought.description: Check if Stochastic RSI indicates overbought condition. In crypto markets, consider adjusting thresholds during strong trends.

stochrsi_oversold.description: Check if Stochastic RSI indicates oversold condition. In crypto markets, consider adjusting thresholds during strong trends.

ppo_bullish_cross.description: Check if PPO crosses above signal line (bullish).

ppo_bearish_cross.description: Check if PPO crosses below signal line (bearish).

pvo_bullish_cross.description: Check if PVO crosses above signal line (bullish volume).

pvo_bearish_cross.description: Check if PVO crosses below signal line (bearish volume).

is_above_sma.description: Check if the current price is above the Simple Moving Average. Uses SMA indicator to calculate the SMA for the given window and returns True if the most recent close price is strictly greater than the SMA value. Returns False if insufficient data is available. Common periods: 9/21 (short-term), 50/200 (long-term). Adjust for crypto's 24/7 markets.

sma_crossover.description: Detect an SMA crossover signal with configurable direction (bullish or bearish). Uses SMA indicator to calculate window_fast and window_slow SMAs. Returns True when a crossover is detected in the specified direction. Bullish crossover (golden cross): window_fast SMA crosses above window_slow SMA Bearish crossover (death cross): window_fast SMA crosses below window_slow SMA The crossover detection compares the previous and current bars: - Bullish: prev window_fast <= prev window_slow AND current window_fast > current window_slow - Bearish: prev window_fast >= prev window_slow AND current window_fast < current window_slow Common periods: 9/21 (short-term), 50/200 (long-term). Adjust for crypto's 24/7 markets.

sma_cross_up.description: Detect a bullish SMA crossover as an entry signal. Returns True when the window_fast SMA crosses above the window_slow SMA (golden cross). This is a momentum-driven entry signal, indicating a transition from bearish to bullish momentum. Common periods: 9/21 (short-term), 50/200 (long-term). Adjust for crypto's 24/7 markets. Note: This is a backwards-compatible wrapper around sma_crossover.

sma_cross_down.description: Detect a bearish SMA crossover as an exit signal. Returns True when the window_fast SMA crosses below the window_slow SMA (death cross). This is a momentum-driven exit signal, indicating a transition from bullish to bearish momentum. Common periods: 9/21 (short-term), 50/200 (long-term). Adjust for crypto's 24/7 markets. Note: This is a backwards-compatible wrapper around sma_crossover.

macd_bullish_cross.description: Detect MACD bullish crossover (MACD line crosses above signal line). A bullish MACD crossover occurs when the MACD line crosses above the signal line, indicating potential upward momentum. Crypto's high volatility may produce frequent signals; use with trend confirmation.

macd_bearish_cross.description: Detect MACD bearish crossover (MACD line crosses below signal line). A bearish MACD crossover occurs when the MACD line crosses below the signal line, indicating potential downward momentum. Crypto's high volatility may produce frequent signals; use with trend confirmation.

macd_positive.description: Check if MACD histogram is positive (bullish momentum). Crypto's high volatility may produce frequent signals; use with trend confirmation.

ema_cross_up.description: Detect bullish EMA crossover (fast EMA crosses above slow EMA). Common periods: 9/21 (short-term), 50/200 (long-term). Adjust for crypto's 24/7 markets.

ema_cross_down.description: Detect bearish EMA crossover (fast EMA crosses below slow EMA). Common periods: 9/21 (short-term), 50/200 (long-term). Adjust for crypto's 24/7 markets.

ema_crossover.description: Detect an EMA crossover signal with configurable direction (bullish or bearish). Uses EMA indicator to calculate window_fast and window_slow EMAs. Returns True when a crossover is detected in the specified direction. Bullish crossover: window_fast EMA crosses above window_slow EMA Bearish crossover: window_fast EMA crosses below window_slow EMA The crossover detection compares the previous and current bars: - Bullish: prev window_fast <= prev window_slow AND current window_fast > current window_slow - Bearish: prev window_fast >= prev window_slow AND current window_fast < current window_slow Common periods: 9/21 (short-term), 50/200 (long-term). Adjust for crypto's 24/7 markets.

price_above_ema.description: Check if price is above the EMA. Common periods: 9/21 (short-term), 50/200 (long-term). Adjust for crypto's 24/7 markets.

adx_strong_trend.description: Check if ADX indicates a strong trend. ADX values above 25 typically indicate a strong trend (either up or down).

adx_bullish_di.description: Check if +DI is greater than -DI (bullish directional movement). When +DI > -DI, bulls have the upper hand.

aroon_up_trend.description: Check if Aroon Up indicates strong uptrend.

aroon_down_trend.description: Check if Aroon Down indicates strong downtrend.

aroon_crossover.description: Check if Aroon lines cross (trend change signal).

wma_cross_up.description: Check if fast WMA crosses above slow WMA (bullish).

wma_cross_down.description: Check if fast WMA crosses below slow WMA (bearish).

trix_bullish.description: Check if TRIX indicates bullish momentum.

trix_bearish.description: Check if TRIX indicates bearish momentum.

mass_reversal_signal.description: Check if Mass Index signals potential reversal (reversal bulge). A reversal bulge occurs when Mass Index rises above 27 then falls below 26.5.

ichimoku_bullish.description: Check if Ichimoku indicates bullish signal (price above cloud).

window_senkou.description: Senkou Span B (leading span B) window

ichimoku_bearish.description: Check if Ichimoku indicates bearish signal (price below cloud).

window_senkou.description: Senkou Span B (leading span B) window

ichimoku_tk_cross.description: Check if Tenkan-sen crosses Kijun-sen (TK cross).

window_senkou.description: Senkou Span B (leading span B) window

kst_bullish_cross.description: Check if KST crosses above signal line (bullish).

kst_bearish_cross.description: Check if KST crosses below signal line (bearish).

dpo_positive.description: Check if DPO is positive (price above detrended average).

dpo_negative.description: Check if DPO is negative (price below detrended average).

cci_overbought.description: Check if CCI indicates overbought condition.

cci_oversold.description: Check if CCI indicates oversold condition.

vortex_bullish.description: Check if Vortex Indicator shows bullish trend (+VI > -VI).

vortex_bearish.description: Check if Vortex Indicator shows bearish trend (-VI > +VI).

vortex_crossover.description: Check if Vortex lines cross (trend change).

psar_bullish.description: Check if PSAR indicates bullish trend (PSAR below price).

psar_bearish.description: Check if PSAR indicates bearish trend (PSAR above price).

psar_reversal.description: Check if PSAR flips sides (potential reversal).

direction.description: Reversal direction, 'bullish' (flip to below price) or 'bearish'

stc_overbought.description: Check if STC indicates overbought condition.

stc_oversold.description: Check if STC indicates oversold condition.

adi_bullish.description: Check if ADI (Accumulation/Distribution) is rising (bullish volume).

adi_bearish.description: Check if ADI (Accumulation/Distribution) is falling (bearish volume).

obv_bullish.description: Check if OBV is rising (bullish volume confirmation).

obv_bearish.description: Check if OBV is falling (bearish volume confirmation).

cmf_bullish.description: Check if CMF (Chaikin Money Flow) indicates buying pressure.

cmf_bearish.description: Check if CMF (Chaikin Money Flow) indicates selling pressure.

force_bullish.description: Check if Force Index indicates bullish momentum.

force_bearish.description: Check if Force Index indicates bearish momentum.

eom_bullish.description: Check if Ease of Movement indicates bullish (easy upward movement).

eom_bearish.description: Check if Ease of Movement indicates bearish (easy downward movement).

vpt_bullish.description: Check if VPT (Volume Price Trend) is rising.

vpt_bearish.description: Check if VPT (Volume Price Trend) is falling.

nvi_bullish.description: Check if NVI (Negative Volume Index) indicates smart money buying. NVI above its moving average suggests smart money accumulation.

nvi_bearish.description: Check if NVI (Negative Volume Index) indicates smart money selling. NVI below its moving average suggests smart money distribution.

mfi_overbought.description: Check if MFI (Money Flow Index) indicates overbought condition.

mfi_oversold.description: Check if MFI (Money Flow Index) indicates oversold condition.

vwap_above.description: Check if price is above VWAP (bullish bias).

vwap_below.description: Check if price is below VWAP (bearish bias).

daily_return_positive.description: Check if daily return is positive.

daily_return_negative.description: Check if daily return is negative.

cumulative_return_positive.description: Check if cumulative return from start is positive.

cumulative_return_target.description: Check if cumulative return has reached target.

bb_upper_breakout.description: Detect price breaking above the upper Bollinger Band. Fires on the bar where price crosses above the upper band, not while price remains above it. Crypto assets frequently test bands during high volatility; use with volume confirmation.

bb_lower_breakout.description: Detect price breaking below the lower Bollinger Band. Fires on the bar where price crosses below the lower band, not while price remains below it. Crypto assets frequently test bands during high volatility; use with volume confirmation.

bb_squeeze.description: Detect Bollinger Band squeeze onset (low volatility, potential breakout). Fires on the bar where band width drops below the threshold, not while it remains below.

atr_high_volatility.description: Check if ATR indicates high volatility relative to price. High volatility (ATR as % of close > threshold) can indicate potential trading opportunities or increased risk.

threshold_pct.description: ATR as percentage of close threshold

kc_upper_breakout.description: Detect price breaking above upper Keltner Channel band. Fires on the bar where price crosses above the upper band.

original_version.description: Use original Keltner Channel formula instead of EMA+ATR

kc_lower_breakout.description: Detect price breaking below lower Keltner Channel band. Fires on the bar where price crosses below the lower band.

original_version.description: Use original Keltner Channel formula instead of EMA+ATR

dc_upper_breakout.description: Detect price breaking above upper Donchian Channel (new high). Fires on the bar where price crosses above the upper band.

dc_lower_breakout.description: Detect price breaking below lower Donchian Channel (new low). Fires on the bar where price crosses below the lower band.

ulcer_high_risk.description: Check if Ulcer Index indicates high downside risk. Higher Ulcer Index values indicate greater downside volatility.

ulcer_low_risk.description: Check if Ulcer Index indicates low downside risk. Lower Ulcer Index values indicate lower downside volatility.

doji_trigger.description: Check if a doji pattern is detected on the current bar. A doji forms when open and close are nearly equal relative to the candle's range, signaling indecision. References: [NISON], [KB-07], [CM45T3R].

long_legged_doji_trigger.description: Check if a long-legged doji is detected on the current bar. A doji with both upper and lower wicks at least wick_threshold of the total range, indicating extreme indecision. References: [NISON], [STOCKCHARTS].

wick_threshold.description: Minimum wick-to-range ratio for both wicks

dragonfly_doji_trigger.description: Check if a dragonfly doji is detected on the current bar. A doji with open/close near the high and a long lower shadow. Bullish signal at support. References: [NISON], [STOCKCHARTS], [TRENDSPIDER].

gravestone_doji_trigger.description: Check if a gravestone doji is detected on the current bar. A doji with open/close near the low and a long upper shadow. Bearish signal at resistance. References: [NISON], [STOCKCHARTS], [TRENDSPIDER].

hammer_trigger.description: Check if a hammer shape is detected on the current bar. Small body at upper end with long lower wick and minimal upper wick. Bullish reversal after downtrend. References: [NISON], [KB-07], [CM45T3R].

wick_ratio.description: Minimum lower wick to body ratio

upper_wick_max.description: Maximum upper wick to body ratio

shooting_star_trigger.description: Check if a shooting star shape is detected on the current bar. Small body at lower end with long upper wick and minimal lower wick. Bearish reversal after uptrend. References: [NISON], [STOCKCHARTS].

wick_ratio.description: Minimum upper wick to body ratio

lower_wick_max.description: Maximum lower wick to body ratio

hanging_man_trigger.description: Check if a hanging man shape is detected on the current bar. Same shape as hammer (small body, long lower wick) but interpreted as a bearish reversal when appearing after an uptrend. References: [NISON], [STOCKCHARTS].

wick_ratio.description: Minimum lower wick to body ratio

upper_wick_max.description: Maximum upper wick to body ratio

inverted_hammer_trigger.description: Check if an inverted hammer shape is detected on the current bar. Same shape as shooting star (small body, long upper wick) but interpreted as a bullish reversal when appearing after a downtrend. References: [NISON], [STOCKCHARTS].

wick_ratio.description: Minimum upper wick to body ratio

lower_wick_max.description: Maximum lower wick to body ratio

marubozu_bullish_trigger.description: Check if a bullish marubozu is detected on the current bar. Full-bodied bullish candle with minimal or no wicks. Signals strong buying conviction. References: [NISON], [KB-07], [CM45T3R].

marubozu_bearish_trigger.description: Check if a bearish marubozu is detected on the current bar. Full-bodied bearish candle with minimal or no wicks. Signals strong selling conviction. References: [NISON], [KB-07], [CM45T3R].

spinning_top_trigger.description: Check if a spinning top is detected on the current bar. Small body with significant wicks on both sides, signaling indecision. References: [NISON], [CM45T3R], [STOCKCHARTS].

wick_min.description: Minimum wick-to-range ratio for both wicks

bullish_engulfing_trigger.description: Check if a bullish engulfing pattern completed on the current bar. Current bullish candle's body completely contains the previous bearish candle's body. Strong bullish reversal. References: [NISON], [KB-07], [STOCKCHARTS].

bearish_engulfing_trigger.description: Check if a bearish engulfing pattern completed on the current bar. Current bearish candle's body completely contains the previous bullish candle's body. Strong bearish reversal. References: [NISON], [KB-07], [STOCKCHARTS].

bullish_harami_trigger.description: Check if a bullish harami pattern completed on the current bar. Current small bullish candle's body is inside the previous large bearish candle's body. Potential bullish reversal. References: [NISON], [STOCKCHARTS].

bearish_harami_trigger.description: Check if a bearish harami pattern completed on the current bar. Current small bearish candle's body is inside the previous large bullish candle's body. Potential bearish reversal. References: [NISON], [STOCKCHARTS].

piercing_line_trigger.description: Check if a piercing line pattern completed on the current bar. Bullish reversal: bearish candle followed by bullish candle opening below prior low and closing above midpoint of prior body. References: [NISON], [KB-07].

dark_cloud_cover_trigger.description: Check if a dark cloud cover pattern completed on the current bar. Bearish reversal: bullish candle followed by bearish candle opening above prior high and closing below midpoint of prior body. References: [NISON], [KB-07].

tweezer_tops_trigger.description: Check if a tweezer tops pattern completed on the current bar. Two consecutive candles with approximately equal highs, first bullish and second bearish. Bearish reversal. References: [NISON], [CM45T3R].

tolerance.description: Maximum high-to-high difference as fraction of average range

tweezer_bottoms_trigger.description: Check if a tweezer bottoms pattern completed on the current bar. Two consecutive candles with approximately equal lows, first bearish and second bullish. Bullish reversal. References: [NISON], [CM45T3R].

tolerance.description: Maximum low-to-low difference as fraction of average range

morning_star_trigger.description: Check if a morning star pattern completed on the current bar. Three-candle bullish reversal: bearish candle, small-bodied star, then bullish candle closing above midpoint of first. References: [NISON], [KB-07].

body_threshold.description: Maximum body-to-range ratio for middle candle

evening_star_trigger.description: Check if an evening star pattern completed on the current bar. Three-candle bearish reversal: bullish candle, small-bodied star, then bearish candle closing below midpoint of first. References: [NISON], [KB-07].

body_threshold.description: Maximum body-to-range ratio for middle candle

three_white_soldiers_trigger.description: Check if three white soldiers pattern completed on the current bar. Three consecutive bullish candles with higher closes, each opening within the previous body. Strong bullish signal. References: [NISON], [KB-07], [STOCKCHARTS].

three_black_crows_trigger.description: Check if three black crows pattern completed on the current bar. Three consecutive bearish candles with lower closes, each opening within the previous body. Strong bearish signal. References: [NISON], [KB-07], [STOCKCHARTS].

three_inside_up_trigger.description: Check if three inside up pattern completed on the current bar. Bearish candle, bullish harami, then bullish close above first candle's open. Confirmed bullish reversal. References: [NISON], [KB-07], [TRENDSPIDER].

three_inside_down_trigger.description: Check if three inside down pattern completed on the current bar. Bullish candle, bearish harami, then bearish close below first candle's open. Confirmed bearish reversal. References: [NISON], [KB-07], [TRENDSPIDER].

inside_bar_trigger.description: Check if an inside bar is detected on the current bar. Current bar's range is completely contained within the previous bar's range. Signals consolidation and potential breakout. References: [KB-07], [TSR].

outside_bar_trigger.description: Check if an outside bar is detected on the current bar. Current bar's range completely engulfs the previous bar's range. Signals increased volatility. References: [KB-07], [TSR].

bullish_pin_bar_trigger.description: Check if a bullish pin bar is detected on the current bar. Long lower wick with body in the upper portion of the range. Bullish reversal at support. References: [KB-07], [TSR], [PRICEACTION].

wick_ratio.description: Minimum dominant wick to body ratio

body_position.description: Maximum body distance from end as fraction of range

bearish_pin_bar_trigger.description: Check if a bearish pin bar is detected on the current bar. Long upper wick with body in the lower portion of the range. Bearish reversal at resistance. References: [KB-07], [TSR], [PRICEACTION].

wick_ratio.description: Minimum dominant wick to body ratio

body_position.description: Maximum body distance from end as fraction of range

two_bar_reversal_bullish_trigger.description: Check if a bullish two-bar reversal completed on the current bar. Bearish bar followed by bullish bar that takes out the low then closes above the prior open. References: [KB-07], [TSR], [DAILYFOREX].

two_bar_reversal_bearish_trigger.description: Check if a bearish two-bar reversal completed on the current bar. Bullish bar followed by bearish bar that takes out the high then closes below the prior open. References: [KB-07], [TSR], [DAILYFOREX].

nr7_trigger.description: Check if a narrow range day is detected on the current bar. Current bar has the smallest range within the lookback period. Signals volatility compression and imminent breakout. Default lookback=7 for NR7; use 4 for NR4. References: [CRABEL], [KB-07], [BULKOWSKI].

lookback.description: Number of bars to compare range against

bullish_pattern_recent.description: Check if any bullish candlestick pattern was detected within lookback bars. Scans for hammer, inverted hammer, bullish engulfing, bullish harami, piercing line, morning star, dragonfly doji, three white soldiers, three inside up, tweezer bottoms, and bullish pin bar within the recent window.

lookback.description: Number of recent bars to check

bearish_pattern_recent.description: Check if any bearish candlestick pattern was detected within lookback bars. Scans for hanging man, shooting star, bearish engulfing, bearish harami, dark cloud cover, evening star, gravestone doji, three black crows, three inside down, tweezer tops, and bearish pin bar within the recent window.

lookback.description: Number of recent bars to check

reversal_pattern_bullish.description: Check if a bullish reversal pattern was detected within lookback bars. Scans for hammer, inverted hammer, bullish engulfing, morning star, piercing line, and dragonfly doji -- the classic bullish reversal patterns.

lookback.description: Number of recent bars to check

reversal_pattern_bearish.description: Check if a bearish reversal pattern was detected within lookback bars. Scans for hanging man, shooting star, bearish engulfing, evening star, dark cloud cover, and gravestone doji -- the classic bearish reversal patterns.

lookback.description: Number of recent bars to check

continuation_pattern_bullish.description: Check if a bullish continuation pattern was detected within lookback bars. Scans for three white soldiers and three inside up.

lookback.description: Number of recent bars to check

continuation_pattern_bearish.description: Check if a bearish continuation pattern was detected within lookback bars. Scans for three black crows and three inside down.

lookback.description: Number of recent bars to check

indecision_pattern_recent.description: Check if an indecision pattern was detected within lookback bars. Scans for doji, spinning top, inside bar, and NR7.

lookback.description: Number of recent bars to check

strong_body_recent.description: Check if a marubozu (strong body) was detected within lookback bars. Scans for both bullish and bearish marubozu patterns.

lookback.description: Number of recent bars to check
